panels.description:
The monitored object's maximum CPU usage among multiple sampling values in a monitoring period

Unit: %
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description:
Maximum latency of commands

Unit: ms
panels.title: Maximum Command Latency

panels.description: Number of connections received during the monitoring period
panels.title: New Connections

panels.description:
Existence of slow query logs in the instance



**Note:**

Slow queries caused by the **MIGRATE**, **SLAVEOF**, **CONFIG**, **BGSAVE**, and **BGREWRITEAOF** commands are not counted.
panels.title: Slow Query Logs

panels.description:
Memory consumed by the monitored object

Unit: %
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Number of keys with an expiration in Redis
panels.title: Keys With an Expiration

panels.description:
Ratio of the number of Redis cache hits to the number of lookups. Calculation: keyspace_hits/(keyspace_hits + keyspace_misses)

Unit: %
panels.title: Hit Rate

panels.description:
Number of bytes used by the Redis server

Unit: KB, MB, or byte (configurable on the console)
panels.title: Used Memory

panels.description:
Dataset memory that the Redis server has used

Unit: KB, MB, or byte (configurable on the console)
panels.title: Used Memory Dataset

panels.description:
Percentage of dataset memory that server has used

Unit: %
panels.title: Used Memory Dataset Ratio

panels.description:
Resident set size (RSS) memory that the Redis server has used, which is the memory that actually resides in the memory, including all stack and heap memory but not swapped-out memory

Unit: KB, MB, or byte (configurable on the console)
panels.title: Used Memory RSS

panels.description: Number of commands processed per second
panels.title: Ops per Second

panels.description: Number of failed lookups of keys in the main dictionary during the monitoring period
panels.title: Keyspace Misses

panels.description: Number of keys in Redis
panels.title: Keys

panels.description: Number of flow control times during the monitoring period
panels.title: Flow Control Times

panels.description:
Percentage of the maximum bandwidth limit used (the average value of the sum of input and output flows)

Unit: %
panels.title: Bandwidth Usage

panels.description:
Percentage of the current number of connections to the maximum allowed number of connections

Unit: %
panels.title: Connection Usage

panels.description: Status of instance nodes. If the status is normal, the value is **0**. If the status is abnormal, the value is **1**.
panels.title: Instance Node Status

panels.description:
Maximum delay from when the node receives commands to when it responds

Unit: μs
panels.title: Maximum Latency

panels.description:
Average delay from when the node receives commands to when it responds

Unit: μs
panels.title: Average Latency

panels.description:
Current average usage of CPU resources

Unit: %
panels.title: Average CPU Usage

panels.description: Number of clients suspended by block operations
panels.title: Blocked Clients

panels.description: Number of connected clients (excluding those from slave nodes)
panels.title: Connected Clients

panels.description:
Number of **DEL** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: DEL

panels.description: Number of keys that have been evicted and deleted during the monitoring period
panels.title: Evicted Keys

panels.description:
Number of **EXPIRE** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: EXPIRE

panels.description: Number of keys that have expired and been deleted during the monitoring period
panels.title: Expired Keys

panels.description:
Number of **GET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: GET

Number of **HDEL** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: HDEL

Number of **HGET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: HGET

panels.description:
Number of **HMGET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s

Number of **HMSET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s

panels.description:
Number of **HSET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: HSET

panels.description:
Instantaneous input traffic

Unit: KB/s
panels.title: Input Flow

Instantaneous output traffic

Unit: KB/s

panels.title: Memory Fragmentation Ratio

panels.description:
Number of **MGET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s

Number of **MSET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s

panels.description:
Number of **SET** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s

panels.description:
Number of bytes used by the Lua engine

Unit: KB, MB, or byte (configurable on the console)

panels.description:
Peak memory consumed by Redis since the Redis server last started

panels.description:
Number of **SADD** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s

Number of **SMEMBERS** commands processed per second

Unit: count/s
panels.title: SMEMBERS

panels.title: Client Longest Output List

Maximum input data length among current client connections

Unit: byte

panels.description: Number of commands processed during the monitoring period
panels.title: Commands Processed

Number of bytes received during the monitoring period

Number of bytes sent during the monitoring period
